_comment: One-name-per-thing groups for the spec-format gate (SPEC INV-255). Each artifact has ONE canonical name; the aliases are the other names a draft might slip into for the same thing. Any alias appearing in the document reds, pointing at the canonical name. An alias must never be a phrase the clean corpus uses for a DIFFERENT thing (e.g. 'work list' is the migration work list, not the queue, so it is not an alias here). The list grows as the cold-reader panel catches two-name drift.
